examples: The losing team left the field bloody but unbowed.
Unbowed, his supporters continue to make their voices heard in the West.
Autumn-tinged brush stands unbowed as the waters of Shuzheng Falls spill past.
Ever the optimist, Dayton is unbowed "We started with a great knowledge base and learned a tremendous amount in the last year, " he says.
Why then, asked an unbowed Darren Millar, had Lesley Griffiths told her fellow cabinet members he'd actually been commissioned to "articulate" the case for change?
